# kUSBNotificationPostForcedSuspend

**Enumeration Case**

The system sends a notification after a forced suspend completes.

## Declaration

```swift
kUSBNotificationPostForcedSuspend = (1 << kUSBNotificationPostForcedSuspendBit)
```
